# Best Kitchen and Bathroom Remodeling — Seattle (Full Details)

> Seattle's top-rated kitchen and bathroom remodeling company. Award-winning craftsmanship, transparent pricing, and free estimates. Serving Seattle, Bellevue, Kirkland, and the greater Puget Sound area since 2010. Licensed (KBREMRP787P3), bonded, and insured. 4.9/5 stars across 347+ verified reviews from Google, Yelp, and Houzz.

## About
- Company: Best Kitchen and Bathroom Remodeling
- Location: 701 5th Ave 42nd Floor, Suite 4272, Seattle, WA 98104
- Phone: (206) 666-4370
- Email: info@kitchenandbathroomremodelingpros.com
- Website: https://kitchenandbathroomremodelingpros.com
- License: KBREMRP787P3 (Washington State General Contractor)
- Rating: 4.9/5 (347+ verified reviews)
- Founded: 2010
- Warranty: 5-Year craftsmanship warranty on all projects
- Employees: 10-25 skilled professionals
- Projects Completed: 500+
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7am–7pm, Sat 8am–5pm, Sun 9am–3pm
- Payment: Cash, Credit Card, Check, Financing Available
- Credentials: Licensed, Bonded & Insured

## Services (Detailed)

### Kitchen Remodeling — /services/kitchen-remodeling/
Full-service kitchen remodeling including layout redesign, cabinetry, countertops, flooring, lighting, plumbing, and electrical. We handle everything from minor refreshes to complete gut renovations. Specializing in open-concept conversions, custom islands, and modern Seattle Craftsman-style kitchens. Typical cost in Seattle ranges from $25,000 to $85,000 depending on scope, materials, and kitchen size.

### Bathroom Remodeling — /services/bathroom-remodeling/
Complete bathroom renovations including tile work, vanity installation, shower and tub upgrades, plumbing, lighting, and accessibility features. We specialize in both primary bathrooms and guest bath updates, with expertise in curbless showers, heated floors, and luxury finishes. Typical cost in Seattle ranges from $15,000 to $50,000 depending on bathroom size and finish selections.

### Cabinet Refacing — /services/cabinet-refacing/
Transform the look of your kitchen without a full remodel by replacing cabinet doors, drawer fronts, and hardware while keeping existing cabinet boxes. This is an affordable alternative that typically takes 3-5 days to complete. Options include shaker, flat-panel, raised-panel, and thermofoil styles. Typical cost in Seattle ranges from $5,000 to $15,000.

### Countertop Installation — /services/countertop-installation/
Professional installation of quartz, granite, marble, butcher block, Dekton, and solid surface countertops for kitchens and bathrooms. We handle templating, fabrication coordination, and precise installation with seamless seams. Popular brands include Caesarstone, Silestone, and Cambria. Typical cost in Seattle ranges from $3,000 to $12,000 depending on material and square footage.

### Shower Remodeling — /services/shower-remodeling/
Custom shower remodels including walk-in showers, frameless glass enclosures, tile surrounds, rain showerheads, bench seating, niche storage, and steam shower systems. We also offer tub-to-shower conversions. Full waterproofing with Schluter or Laticrete systems. Typical cost in Seattle ranges from $5,000 to $20,000.

### Bathtub Replacement — /services/bathtub-replacement/
Professional bathtub removal and replacement including soaking tubs, freestanding tubs, alcove tubs, and walk-in tubs for accessibility. Includes plumbing modifications, surround finishing, and tile work. Typical cost in Seattle ranges from $3,000 to $12,000.

### Vanity Installation — /services/vanity-installation/
Custom and pre-fabricated vanity installation including single and double vanities, floating vanities, and vessel sink setups. Includes countertop, sink, faucet, mirror, and plumbing connections. Custom builds available for non-standard dimensions. Typical cost in Seattle ranges from $1,500 to $6,000.

### Tile Installation — /services/tile-installation/
Expert tile installation for floors, walls, backsplashes, and shower surrounds using ceramic, porcelain, natural stone, glass mosaic, and specialty tiles (zellige, encaustic). We handle waterproofing, backer board, heated floor systems, and precise layout patterns. Typical cost in Seattle ranges from $2,000 to $10,000 depending on area and tile selection.

### Kitchen Layout Design — /services/kitchen-layout-design/
Professional kitchen space planning and layout design including work triangle optimization, storage solutions, island placement, and traffic flow analysis. We use 3D renderings so you can visualize your new kitchen before construction begins. Multiple design rounds included. Typical cost is included with full kitchen remodel projects or $500-$2,000 as a standalone service.

### Custom Cabinetry — /services/custom-cabinetry/
Fully custom-built cabinetry designed and built to your exact specifications, including unique sizes, specialty storage solutions, premium wood species (walnut, cherry, white oak, maple), and furniture-grade joinery. Ideal for kitchens with non-standard dimensions or homeowners wanting one-of-a-kind design. Typical cost in Seattle ranges from $10,000 to $35,000.

### Flooring Installation — /services/flooring-installation/
Kitchen and bathroom flooring installation including luxury vinyl plank (LVP), hardwood, tile, and heated floor systems. We handle subfloor preparation, moisture barriers, and transitions between rooms. Waterproof options available. Typical cost in Seattle ranges from $3,000 to $15,000 depending on material and square footage.

### Aging-in-Place Remodeling — /services/aging-in-place/
ADA-compliant and universal design remodeling for kitchens and bathrooms, including grab bars, walk-in tubs, curbless showers, comfort-height toilets, lever-handle faucets, anti-slip flooring, wider doorways, and adjustable-height counters. We help homeowners stay safely in their homes as they age with dignity and style. Typical cost in Seattle ranges from $5,000 to $30,000.

## Service Areas (28 Cities)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does a kitchen remodel cost in Seattle?
A kitchen remodel in Seattle typically costs between $25,000 and $85,000. A minor refresh with cosmetic updates runs $25,000-$40,000, a mid-range remodel with new cabinets and countertops costs $40,000-$65,000, and a high-end renovation with custom cabinetry and premium finishes ranges from $65,000-$85,000+.

### How much does a bathroom remodel cost in Seattle?
A bathroom remodel in Seattle typically costs between $15,000 and $50,000. A basic update with new fixtures and paint runs $15,000-$22,000, a mid-range remodel with new tile and vanity costs $22,000-$35,000, and a luxury renovation with heated floors and custom tilework ranges from $35,000-$50,000+.

### How long does a kitchen remodel take?
Most kitchen remodels in Seattle take 6-12 weeks from demolition to completion. A minor cosmetic update may take 3-4 weeks, while a full gut renovation with layout changes can take 10-14 weeks. Permitting can add 2-4 weeks to the timeline.

### Do I need a permit to remodel my kitchen or bathroom in Seattle?
Yes, most remodeling projects in Seattle require permits from the Seattle Department of Construction and Inspections (SDCI). Electrical, plumbing, and structural work always require permits. Cosmetic-only updates like painting or replacing fixtures typically do not. We handle all permit applications and inspections for our clients.

### What is your warranty?
We offer a 5-year craftsmanship warranty on all labor and installation. This covers any defects in workmanship. Manufacturer warranties on materials and products are passed through to the homeowner and vary by product.

### Do you offer financing?
Yes, we offer flexible financing options through our lending partners, including 0% interest plans for qualified buyers. Ask about financing during your free estimate consultation.

### Are you licensed and insured?
Yes. Best Kitchen and Bathroom Remodeling is fully licensed (WA contractor license KBREMRP787P3), bonded, and insured. We carry general liability insurance and workers' compensation coverage.

### How do I get started?
Request a free estimate through our website at /get-a-quote/ or call us at (206) 666-4370. We will schedule an in-home consultation to discuss your project, take measurements, and provide a detailed written estimate within 3-5 business days.
